news.t: Simplify Launches Two Tax-Aware ETFs to Meet Advisor Demand for Simpler, More Efficient Portfolio Tools

overview.description: The Simplify Tax Aware Diversified Income Strategy ETF (DINE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. DINEis actively managed, seeking capital appreciation throughexposure across global income-linked instruments, including emerging markets. Investments include stocks,debts, REITs, MLPs, ETFs, currencies, and derivatives. DINE was launched on May 4, 2026 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Launches Two Tax-Aware ETFs to Meet Advisor Demand for Simpler, More Efficient Portfolio Tools
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify launches two ETFs to help investors access diversified strategies while seeking to minimize the tax drag that can impact long-term results.
